caption: he'd rather mine blocks than text me back, so his anniversary is a world he has to dig through to reach me.

overlays.hook: he ignored me for minecraft, so i buried our anniversary six gems deep.
beats: our photos framed in the caverns
he can keep the diamonds. i want the vault.

rationale.summary: A sharpened revision of the gamer-partner wedge for the Blockheart Mine: the hook now leads on the grievance in its first three words and the beats keep the earn-the-vault payoff. It stays on the live premium world at the correct $45 tier and points to getforevermore.co.
rationale.hook_reasoning: The feedback said the hook was soft, so it now opens on 'he ignored me' — the concrete tension — instead of easing in; that is what stops the scroll for this audience.
limits: kinetic-text video — still no captured Blockheart Mine footage, so the world is conveyed through overlays over motion rather than a screen recording.
rationale.audience: Partners of gamers shopping for an anniversary gift with a real, earned payoff.

addressed: made the hook harsher and specific in the first three words
kept it on the live blockheart mine world
